entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: A fiber crop that is replacing rice in certain areas of Odisha due to environmental conditions.

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A major crop in the study area of Odisha being replaced by cotton.

entities.name: LOW YIELDS
entities.description: Reduced agricultural productivity associated with unproductive soils.

entities.name: SPACE TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used for generating crop production statistics and sustainable agriculture.

entities.name: LAND-BASED OBSERVATIONS
entities.description: Observations used alongside space technology for crop production statistics.

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: A technique for extracting crop characteristics using mathematical models.

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL INFORMATION SYSTEM (GIS)
entities.description: A system used with remote sensing and high speed computers to extract crop characteristics.

entities.name: GEOSPATIAL TOOLS
entities.description: Tools that play a vital role in agriculture, including MRT2011.

entities.name: MRT2011
entities.description: MODIS Reprojection Tool, Version 4.1, used to support MODIS Land products and extract NDVI.

entities.name: MODIS LAND PRODUCTS
entities.description: Data products distributed as HDF-EOS files projected to a sinusoidal grid.

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL DATA FORMAT
entities.description: A data format (.hdf) used for MODIS Land products.

entities.name: EARTH OBSERVING SYSTEM
entities.description: A system (HDF-EOS) used for projecting data files.

entities.name: SINUSOIDAL GRID
entities.description: A tile-based grid (.tif) used for projecting MODIS Land products.

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetative Index used to identify crop area and vegetative indices.

entities.name: VEGETATIVE INDICES
entities.description: Indices used for identifying crop area, including NDVI.

entities.name: ERDAS IMAGINE2014
entities.description: Software used for the classification of Land use/land cover (LULC).

entities.name: IRRIGATION FACILITIES
entities.description: The availability of water for crops; lack thereof leads to crop diversification.

entities.name: UNPRODUCTIVE SOILS
entities.description: Soils with low productivity that contribute to low yields and crop shifts.

entities.name: ODISHA
entities.description: The Indian state where the study on cotton croplands was conducted.

entities.name: RAYAGADA
entities.description: A district in Odisha where MRT2011 was applied.

entities.name: KALAHANDI
entities.description: A district in Odisha where MRT2011 was applied.

entities.name: BALANGIR
entities.description: A district in Odisha where MRT2011 was applied.

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The backbone of the Indian economy and crucial for food security.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION STATISTICS
entities.description: Regular updates generated using space technology and land-based observations.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agriculture that meets current needs without compromising future generations.

entities.name: CROP PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of the crop growth cycle.

entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL CYCLE
entities.description: The continuous movement of water on, above, and below the surface of the Earth.

entities.name: CROP AREA
entities.description: The total land area used for cultivating crops.

entities.name: LULC
entities.description: Land use/land cover classification.
